creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
For example https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=224563
It is labeled with the existing port directory: databases/arangodb32

Bit bugzilla didn't assign a maintainer.

When I tried to set "maintainer-feedback ?" manually to galu@packetdam.com (who is a maintainer), it failed: 
> maintainer-feedback requestee: galu@packetdam.com did not match anything
